name: Oye! It's Friday!
overview: Oye! It's Friday! was an Indian variety talk show on NDTV Imagine hosted by Farhan Akhtar. It featured a new celebrity every week. The show was made up of special performances by dancers and singers, jokes and light-hearted comedy.

trailers.title: Oye! It's Friday Jan9th Deepika Padukone Part1/5
